Example E-Commerce Platform

Role: Lead Engineer

THE PROBLEM

Example E-Commerce Platform

Built a scalable e-commerce platform serving 50k+ daily users with a focus on performance and accessibility.

THE APPROACH

Technical Strategy

Improved checkout conversion by 23%, reduced page load time by 40%, achieved WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.

  • React
  • Node.js
  • PostgreSQL

THE OUTCOME

Improved checkout conversion by 23%, reduced page load time by 40%, achieved WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.

This is the detailed body content of the case study. It can include multiple paragraphs, technical details, and more context about the project.

Technical Approach

We used a modern tech stack with React on the frontend and Node.js microservices on the backend. The architecture was designed for horizontal scalability.

Challenges Overcome

One of the main challenges was optimizing the search functionality to handle the large product catalog efficiently.
